## Meeting Purpose

[Review client sprint progress and announce new team structure.](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Brex Pivot:** Client John wants to shift focus from editorial (blocked by his slow reviews) to building tools and templates for his affiliate site, Pry.co. George will present a new strategy tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [**Turnstile DA Jump:** The client's Domain Authority (DA) rose 10 points (4→14) in one month. This key win provides grace as the team works to fix a difficult content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
  - [**NetRix Tech SEO Crisis:** A recent site migration broke NetRix's technical SEO, dropping indexed pages from \~1,500 to 38. The root cause is a `/en` → `/es` redirect.](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
  - [**New Team Structure:** William now manages the team, with Sydney elevated to Lead ME to scale content strategy and free up Aida for a full EM role.](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=2791.0)

## Topics

### Client Sprint Updates

  - [**Brex (Week 8):**](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
      - [**Problem:** 15 articles are backlogged, awaiting slow client reviews from John.](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
      - [**Pivot:** John requested a shift to building tools/templates for his affiliate site, Pry.co, which he sees as a bigger traffic driver.](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
      - [**Action:** George will present a new strategy tomorrow. Content production continues as usual until then.](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [**Ramp (Week 8):**](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
      - [**Progress:** 33 articles indexed; 5 published this week.](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
      - [**Backlinks:** 10 referring domains secured (vs. 2 previously).](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=958.0)
      - [**Sentiment:** Client is positive; Aida will share more AI visibility wins tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [**Turnstile (Week 7):**](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
      - [**Challenge:** The content pipeline is difficult; articles require significant edits.](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
      - [**Win:** Domain Authority (DA) increased 10 points (4→14) in one month, providing grace.](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
      - [**Pipeline Fix:** Kirkland is optimizing the pipeline. The new metric is "time from pipeline run to client delivery."](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
  - [**BlackSoul (Week 7):**](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)
      - [**Progress:** 5 blogs created this week; 5 more due.](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)
      - [**Sentiment:** Client is delighted with content quality.](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1890.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Client is concerned about reviewing the high volume of content.](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1890.0)
  - [**Navan (New):**](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
      - [**Action:** George meets with Victor tomorrow to align on a new AI messaging doc for a February campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Client Nima is unsure how to contextualize early metrics and questioned the validity of CheckThat prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
  - [**Cresta (New):**](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
      - [**Status:** Client is instrumented for attribution tracking via HubSpot and a reusable GA4 report.](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [**CRV (New):**](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=2125.0)
      - [**Action:** Presenting artifacts and content strategy today.](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=2125.0)
      - [**Goal:** Build grace with this key investor client, whose portfolio company kicks off next week.](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
  - [**NetRix (New):**](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
      - [**Problem:** A recent site migration broke technical SEO, dropping indexed pages from \~1,500 to 38.](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
      - [**Root Cause:** A misconfigured redirect sends all `/en` (English) pages to `/es` (Spanish).](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=2582.0)
      - [**Action:** Kirkland's team is investigating.](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=2582.0)

### New Team Structure & Process

  - [**Leadership:** William now manages the team. George is a strategic advisor.](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=2791.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** Sydney is elevated to Lead ME to scale content strategy and free up Aida for a full EM role.](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=2842.0)
  - [**Escalation Path:** A clear path is established for issues: ME → Sydney → William → Panzer (strategic) or Kirkland (technical).](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=2959.0)
  - [**Onboarding:** MEs will now join the initial client kickoff call to gain context from the start.](https://fathom.video/share/kd5BpGetb-XLMW5o-Ls_FQz5AHfnnnvz?tab=summary&timestamp=3031.0)
